todoAPI-main/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem standards.
todoAPI-main/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading to Spring Boot 3.x is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

todoAPI-main/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
todoAPI-main/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must explicitly target Java 21 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the upgraded Spring Boot 3.x parent.

todoAPI-main/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
todoAPI-main/pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and removed in newer versions; 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the required replacement for compatibility with Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.

todoAPI-main/src/main/java/com/alienexpl.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
todoAPI-main/src/main/java/com/alienexpl.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed from the classpath in Spring Boot 3 (which requires Jakarta EE 9+), causing a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.
